name: maigret
description: Maigret is an easy-to-use and powerful OSINT tool for collecting a dossier on a person by username only

options.description: Use all sites for scan
Display version information and dependencies

Time in seconds to wait for response to requests (default {settings.timeout}s). A longer timeout will be more likely to get results from slow sites. On the other hand, this may cause a long delay to g
Attempts to restart temporarily failed requests
Allowed number of concurrent connections (default {settings.max_connections})
Disable recursive search by additional data extracted from pages
Disable parsing pages for additional data and other usernames
Specify identifier(s) type (default: username)
Load Maigret database from a JSON file or HTTP web resource
File with cookies
Do not make search by the specified username or other ids
If using multiple usernames, the output of the results will be saved to this folder
Make requests over a proxy. e.g. socks5://127.0.0.1:1080
Specify URL of your Tor gateway. Default is socks5://127.0.0.1:9050
Specify URL of your I2P gateway. Default is http://127.0.0.1:4444
Enable (experimental) feature of checking domains on usernames
Specify tags of sites (see `--stats`)
Limit analysis to just the specified sites (multiple option)
Use disabled sites to search (may cause many false positives)
Parse page by URL and extract username and IDs to use for search
URL of existing profile in new site to submit
Do self check for sites and database and disable non-working ones
Show database statistics (most frequent sites engines and tags)
Print sites where the username was not found
Print errors messages: connection, captcha, site country ban, etc
Display extra information and metrics
Display extra/service information and metrics
Display extra/service/debug information and metrics, save responses in debug.log
Don't color terminal output
Don't show progressbar
Create a TXT report (one report per username)
Create a CSV report (one report per username)
Create an HTML report (one report per username)
Create a XMind 8 mindmap report (one report per username)
Create a PDF report (one report per username)
Create a graph report (one report per username)
Generate a JSON report of specific type: simple, ndjson (one report per username)
Method of results sorting in reports (default: in order of getting the result)

args.name: user
args.description: The username for which you want to search sites
